name: pi-bio-quarto
author: Sounkou Mahamane Toure
description: Trusted Quarto execution engine for Node/TypeScript cells over pi-bio-agent host surfaces.

scripts.render:example: npm run build && quarto render examples/basic.qmd --to markdown --output output.md
scripts.readme:qmd: npm run build && quarto render README.qmd --to gfm --output README.md
scripts.check:readme: npm run readme:qmd && git diff --exit-code -- README.md
scripts.check: npm run check:generated && npm test && npm run check:readme
